{{Item
| image = Radio collar.png
| id = radio_collar
}}

'''Radio Collar''' is an equipable item that is used alongside the [[Canine Tracker]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| Iron Ingots <br>+ Redstone Dust
|
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on your dog to quickly equip the item or use the '''Style tab''' within the [[Dog Menu#Style|Dog Menu]].

== Used In ==
* [[Canine Tracker]]

== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
